---
name: to-issues
description: Convert plans or PRDs into independently actionable issue drafts. Use when preparing an execution backlog from strategy or design artifacts.
---

# to-issues

## Workflow

1. Read source artifact (plan, PRD, handoff, decision note).
2. Split work into vertical slices with clear ownership boundaries.
3. Draft issue title, summary, acceptance criteria, risks, and dependencies.
4. Suggest labels and priority order.
5. Return drafts for review before creation.

## References

Cross-link relevant records from `docs/decisions/` where applicable.
